--------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- -------------------------------------------------------------------------- It appears as if there is not enough space for /dev/shm/sm_segment.23ff5195c3f7.1000.661b0000.0 (the shared-memory backing file). It is likely that your MPI job will now either abort or experience performance degradation.
